checkpoint_selection: highest pooled source-disjoint field validation macro-F1 across inherited epoch zero and the pre-frozen three-epoch partial-fine-tuning schedule, with global validation macro-F1 as a tie-breaker
backbone_fine_tuning: final two DINOv2 transformer blocks and final norm only; all earlier layers frozen
calibration: equal-source weighting across the nine declared validation sources, minimum temperature 1.0
expected_crop_source_in_product: trusted crop-cycle metadata supplied by the API request
test_disclosure: The architecture responds only to aggregate v13 source/class gaps. The source-balanced sampler, two-block fine-tuning schedule, field-validation selection set, checkpoint, and every numerical parameter were frozen from manifest-v6 validation. No v14 frozen-test image, label, logit, metric, confidence, or per-example failure was inspected before this contract was frozen.
